brand.name: Appointment Prep AI
brand.tagline: Smart, Safe, and Personalized Patient Preparation Instructions

hero.headline: Generate Personalized Appointment Prep Instructions
hero.subheadline: Ensure patient safety with AI-powered, rule-based preparation instructions that are accurate, clear, and friendly.

features.title: Deterministic Rules Engine
features.description: All medical instructions are generated by a deterministic rules engine based on appointment type and procedure, ensuring consistency and safety.

features.title: AI-Powered Clarity
features.description: Optional AI integration rewrites instructions in a warm, friendly tone without inventing medical requirements.

features.title: Local-First Architecture
features.description: All patient data is stored locally in SQLite with no cloud dependencies, ensuring privacy and HIPAA readiness.

features.title: Graceful Fallback
features.description: System works perfectly without AI, automatically falling back to template-based generation when needed.

features.title: Premium Medical UI
features.description: Professional healthcare interface with design tokens for consistent, accessible, and beautiful user experience.

features.title: Message History
features.description: Track all generated instructions with searchable history and easy retrieval for patient records.
